resources.name: SCEP SPEC-007 Automated Acceptance
resources.description: Automated Charging Session lifecycle acceptance. Run the requests in numeric order with the Insomnia Collection Runner.

resources.name: SPEC-007 Automated Lifecycle
resources.description: Run all requests in numeric order. Scripts generate unique data, calculate the activation window, capture response values, and assert the contract.

resources.name: 01 - Login Administrator and Initialize Run
02 - Create Facility
03 - Create Station and Connector
04 - Create EV Driver
05 - Login EV Driver
06 - Create Vehicle
07 - Create Eligible Reservation
08 - Activate Charging Session
09 - Verify Connector Charging
10 - List Owned Active Sessions
11 - Complete Charging Session
12 - Verify Reservation Completed
resources.afterResponseScript:
insomnia.test('reservation detail returns 200', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200));
insomnia.test('reservation is COMPLETED', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.json().status).to.eql('COMPLETED'));

resources.name: 13 - Verify Connector Available
14 - Verify SPEC-007 Metrics
